Contract.Name: Arts and Crafts
Contract.Description: Kids are completing more arts and crafts projects than ever, we need more supplies!

Contract.Name: Your First Contract
Contract.Description: We heard you are open to contract work! Help fill this order from the local pharmacy!

Contract.Name: Holiday Lights
Contract.Description: With homes and businesses firing up their Holiday lights and decorations, local power generation needs more juice!

Contract.Name: Three Amigos
Contract.Description: The county fair is holding a contest for teams of 3 farmers to win big prizes!

Contract.Name: Last Minute Shipping
Contract.Description: Shipping companies are slammed! More Quantum storage is needed!

Contract.Name: Shop at Home
Contract.Description: With the incredible surge of at home delivery for just about everything Quantum storage solutions are booming!

Contract.Name: Quantitative Egging
Contract.Description: The economy is taking a hit and the government is buying up loads of eggs to keep everyone afloat!

Contract.Name: Quarantine
Contract.Description: While billions are in self quarantine, orders of Superfood eggs for home meals have exploded! Stay safe at home. Auxbrain has donated $500 to a food service worker support fund.

Contract.Name: Egg Pre Orders
Contract.Description: Easter is around the corner, so naturally store are starting to stock up!

Contract.Name: Chocolate Refill
Contract.Description: The shelves of chocolate are empty at grocery stores, help fill the new orders!

Contract.Name: Snack Attack
Contract.Description: For an unknown reason baked goods are flying off the shelves and more eggs are needed to restock!
